channel.title: Safety on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Safety on Arrans github.io

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: cncf/tag-security
item.description: 🔐CNCF Security Technical Advisory Group – secure access, policy control, privacy, auditing, explainability and more!
